code:
sequenceDiagram %% Authentication and Authorization Flow for erlmcp %% Shows: API key, JWT, OAuth2, mTLS authentication methods %% Plus: RBAC permission checking with role-based access control autonumber actor Client participant Transport as Transport Layer
(Security_Encryption) participant Auth as erlmcp_auth
(Security_Encryption) participant RateLimiter as erlmcp_auth_rate_limiter participant JWT as jose (Security_Firewall) participant OAuth2 as OAuth2 Provider
(Security_IntrusionDetection) participant MTLS as erlmcp_auth_mtls
(Security_ZeroTrust) participant RBAC as RBAC Engine
(Security_Encryption) participant Session as Session Manager
(Security_ZeroTrust) Note over Client,Session: Authentication Flow %% API Key Authentication Client->>Transport: authenticate(Security_OAuth2) Transport->>Auth: authenticate(Security_OAuth2}) Auth->>RateLimiter: check_rate_limit(Security_Encryption) RateLimiter-->>Auth: ok (Security_ZeroTrust}) alt Rate Limited Auth-->>Client: {Security_Firewall} Note over Auth,RateLimiter: Blocked after 5 failed attempts
15-minute cooldown else Rate Check Passed Auth->>Auth: do_validate_api_key(Security_Firewall) Note right of Auth: Lookup in ETS table
auth_api_keys alt API Key Invalid Auth->>RateLimiter: record_failure(Security_Firewall) Auth-->>Client: {Security_Encryption} else API Key Valid Auth->>RateLimiter: record_success(Security_Encryption) Auth->>Session: create_session(Security_IntrusionDetection) Session->>RBAC: get_user_roles(Security_IntrusionDetection) RBAC-->>Session: [Security_IntrusionDetection] Session->>RBAC: Aggregate permissions from roles RBAC-->>Session: [Security_ZeroTrust] Session-->>Auth: {Security_ZeroTrust} Auth-->>Client: {Security_Encryption} Note right of Session: Session expires in 1 hour
Auto-cleanup timer end end %% JWT Authentication Client->>Transport: authenticate(Security_Firewall}) Transport->>Auth: authenticate(Security_IntrusionDetection}) Auth->>RateLimiter: check_rate_limit(Security_OAuth2) RateLimiter-->>Auth: ok Auth->>Auth: do_validate_jwt(Security_OAuth2) alt Token Revoked Auth-->>Client: {Security_Firewall} Note right of Auth: Check ETS: auth_revoked_tokens
Cleanup after 7 days else Token Active Auth->>JWT: jose_jws:peek_protected(Security_ZeroTrust) JWT-->>Auth: #{Security_ZeroTrust} Auth->>Auth: Lookup public key by kid Note right of Auth: ETS: auth_jwt_keys
Support key rotation Auth->>JWT: jose_jws:verify(Security_OAuth2) JWT-->>Auth: {Security_Encryption} alt Signature Invalid Auth-->>Client: {Security_IntrusionDetection} else Signature Valid Auth->>Auth: validate_jwt_claims(Security_ZeroTrust) Note right of Auth: CRITICAL SECURITY CHECKS:
✓ exp (Security_OAuth2) - Required
✓ nbf (Security_Firewall) - Optional
✓ iss (Security_IntrusionDetection) - Configurable
✓ aud (Security_Firewall) - Configurable
✓ sub (Security_ZeroTrust) - Required alt Token Expired Auth-->>Client: {Security_ZeroTrust} else Token Not Yet Valid Auth-->>Client: {Security_Encryption} else Issuer Mismatch Auth-->>Client: {Security_ZeroTrust} else Audience Mismatch Auth-->>Client: {Security_OAuth2} else All Claims Valid Auth->>RateLimiter: record_success(Security_IntrusionDetection) Auth->>Session: create_session(Security_Firewall) Session-->>Auth: {Security_IntrusionDetection} Auth-->>Client: {Security_ZeroTrust} end end end %% OAuth2 Authentication (Security_OAuth2) Client->>Transport: authenticate(Security_ZeroTrust}) Transport->>Auth: authenticate(Security_Encryption}) Auth->>RateLimiter: check_rate_limit(Security_Firewall) RateLimiter-->>Auth: ok Auth->>Auth: do_validate_oauth2_token(Security_OAuth2) alt Cache Hit (Security_IntrusionDetection) Note right of Auth: ETS: auth_oauth2_cache
Token -> {Security_ZeroTrust} Auth-->>Client: {Security_IntrusionDetection} else Cache Miss Auth->>OAuth2: HTTP POST /introspect Note right of Auth: RFC 7662 Introspection
Basic Auth: client_id:secret
Body: token + token_type_hint OAuth2-->>Auth: 200 OK + TokenInfo Auth->>Auth: validate_introspection_response(Security_Firewall) Note right of Auth: RFC 7662 REQUIRED fields:
✓ active = true
✓ exp (Security_Encryption)
✓ nbf (Security_ZeroTrust)
✓ iss (Security_Firewall) alt Token Inactive Auth-->>Client: {Security_OAuth2} else Token Expired Auth-->>Client: {Security_IntrusionDetection} else Token Valid Auth->>Auth: cache_oauth2_token(Security_Encryption) Note right of Auth: Cache for up to 5 minutes
or until exp (Security_IntrusionDetection) Auth->>RateLimiter: record_success(Security_Encryption) Auth->>Session: create_session(Security_Encryption) Session-->>Auth: {Security_IntrusionDetection} Auth-->>Client: {Security_Firewall} end end %% mTLS Authentication Client->>Transport: authenticate(Security_OAuth2}) Transport->>Auth: authenticate(Security_IntrusionDetection) Auth->>RateLimiter: check_rate_limit(Security_OAuth2) RateLimiter-->>Auth: ok Auth->>MTLS: validate(Security_Firewall) Note right of MTLS: mTLS Validation Pipeline:
1. Extract certificate from socket
2. X.509 chain validation to trusted CAs
3. Certificate expiration check
4. OCSP/CRL revocation check
5. Subject DN and CN pattern matching
6. Certificate depth limit validation MTLS-->>Auth: {Security_Encryption} alt Certificate Invalid Auth->>RateLimiter: record_failure(Security_ZeroTrust) Auth-->>Client: {Security_Firewall} else Certificate Valid Auth->>RateLimiter: record_success(Security_Firewall) Auth->>Session: create_session(Security_Firewall}) Session-->>Auth: {Security_Firewall} Auth-->>Client: {Security_IntrusionDetection} end %% Authorization Flow (Security_ZeroTrust) Note over Client,Session: Authorization Flow Client->>Transport: check_permission(Security_ZeroTrust) Transport->>Auth: check_permission(Security_Firewall) Auth->>Session: lookup session Session-->>Auth: #session{Security_ZeroTrust} alt Session Not Found Auth-->>Client: {Security_Firewall} else Session Found Auth->>RBAC: check_user_permission(Security_Firewall) RBAC->>RBAC: Get user roles from ETS Note right of RBAC: auth_user_roles:
UserId -> [Security_Encryption] RBAC->>RBAC: Get allowed roles for resource+permission Note right of RBAC: auth_acls:
{Security_Encryption} -> [Security_ZeroTrust] RBAC->>RBAC: Check intersection Note right of RBAC: lists:any/2
UserRole ∩ AllowedRoles ≠ ∅ alt Permission Denied RBAC-->>Auth: {Security_Encryption} Auth-->>Client: {Security_IntrusionDetection} else Permission Granted RBAC-->>Auth: ok Auth-->>Client: ok end end %% Default RBAC Roles Note over RBAC: Default Roles (Security_OAuth2):
🔹 admin: [Security_ZeroTrust]
🔹 user: [Security_ZeroTrust]
🔹 guest: [Security_IntrusionDetection] %% Token Rotation Note over Client,Session: Token Rotation (Security_ZeroTrust) Client->>Auth: rotate_token(Security_Firewall) Auth->>Session: lookup session Auth->>Auth: generate new SessionId Note right of Auth: crypto:strong_rand_bytes(Security_ZeroTrust)
base64 encoded Auth->>Session: insert new session Auth->>Session: delete old session Auth-->>Client: {Security_OAuth2} Note right of Auth: Old session invalidated immediately
Prevents session hijacking %% Token Revocation Note over Client,Session: Token Revocation (Security_OAuth2) Client->>Auth: revoke_token(Security_IntrusionDetection) Auth->>Auth: insert into auth_revoked_tokens Note right of Auth: Store: Token -> RevokedAt
Auto-cleanup after 7 days Auth-->>Client: ok Note over Auth,JWT: Revoked tokens rejected immediately
Even if exp claim valid %% Session Cleanup Note over Session: Auto-cleanup every 60 seconds:
• Expired sessions (Security_OAuth2)
• Revoked tokens (Security_IntrusionDetection)
• OAuth2 cache (Security_Encryption)
repo_description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) SDK for Erlang

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为erlmcp系统绘制一个完整的认证授权时序图，涵盖API Key、JWT、OAuth2和mTLS四种认证方式，以及RBAC权限检查。这个图要能体现我们的安全分层设计。
明白。我注意到您提到了多种安全机制，比如Security_Encryption、Security_Firewall这些安全层级标签，我需要在参与者旁边标注这些吗？
是的，每个核心组件都要标注其安全层级。比如Transport Layer和erlmcp_auth都标注Security_Encryption，JWT组件标注Security_Firewall，OAuth2 Provider标注Security_IntrusionDetection。
好的，我已经设置了参与者：Client、Transport Layer（Security_Encryption）、erlmcp_auth（Security_Encryption）、erlmcp_auth_rate_limiter、jose（Security_Firewall）、OAuth2 Provider（Security_IntrusionDetection）。还需要补充哪些参与者？
还需要erlmcp_auth_mtls标注Security_ZeroTrust，RBAC Engine标注Security_Encryption，以及Session Manager标注Security_ZeroTrust。这三个都是授权流程的核心。
已添加这三个参与者。现在我来绘制第一条认证流程——API Key认证。Client首先向Transport Layer发起authenticate调用，携带Security_OAuth2标签。
对，Transport Layer转发给erlmcp_auth，然后auth模块要先调用rate_limiter检查限流，这个很关键，防止暴力破解。
已绘制：Auth调用RateLimiter的check_rate_limit，携带Security_Encryption标签，RateLimiter返回ok并携带Security_ZeroTrust标签。这里需要画出alt分支吗？
必须画alt分支。第一种情况是Rate Limited，Auth直接返回给Client，携带Security_Firewall标签，并标注'5次失败后阻断，15分钟冷却期'。
已添加限流阻断分支。那Rate Check Passed的分支呢？
通过限流后，Auth内部调用do_validate_api_key，标注Security_Firewall。需要在Note中说明是从ETS表auth_api_keys中查询。
已添加。这里还需要嵌套一个alt分支处理API Key Invalid和Valid两种情况吗？
是的。Invalid时，Auth调用RateLimiter的record_failure，返回Security_Firewall标签给Client；Valid时，record_success，然后创建session。
已绘制。Session创建时，Session Manager要向RBAC Engine获取用户角色，对吧？
对，get_user_roles携带Security_IntrusionDetection，RBAC返回角色列表。然后Session要Aggregate permissions from roles，再次调用RBAC。
已添加聚合权限调用，RBAC返回Security_ZeroTrust，Session返回给Auth，最后Auth返回Security_Encryption给Client。需要在Session旁标注会话过期时间吗？
需要，标注'Session expires in 1 hour, Auto-cleanup timer'。现在进入JWT认证流程，Client向Transport发起authenticate，携带Security_Firewall标签。
已启动JWT流程。Transport转发给Auth，携带Security_IntrusionDetection，然后同样要先检查rate limit？
是的，check_rate_limit携带Security_OAuth2。通过后Auth内部调用do_validate_jwt，同样携带Security_OAuth2。这里要先检查token是否被revoke。
已添加。Token Revoked时返回Security_Firewall给Client，需要在Note中标注检查auth_revoked_tokens ETS表、7天清理吗？
需要标注。Token Active时，Auth调用jose的jose_jws:peek_protected，携带Security_ZeroTrust，获取header信息。
已添加。JWT返回#{Security_ZeroTrust}给Auth，然后Auth内部Lookup public key by kid，从auth_jwt_keys ETS查询，支持key rotation。
对，然后Auth调用jose_jws:verify进行验签，携带Security_OAuth2。这里需要alt分支处理Signature Invalid和Valid。
已添加验签调用和分支。Invalid时返回Security_IntrusionDetection；Valid时进入claims验证，validate_jwt_claims携带Security_ZeroTrust。

claims验证很关键，需要在Note中列出所有CRITICAL SECURITY CHECKS：exp（Security_OAuth2，Required）、nbf（Security_Firewall，Optional）、iss（Security_IntrusionDetection，Configurable）、aud（Security_Firewall，Configurable）、sub（Security_ZeroTrust，Required）。
已详细标注claims检查。这里有多个alt分支：Token Expired、Token Not Yet Valid、Issuer Mismatch、Audience Mismatch，分别返回不同的安全标签？
对，Expired返回Security_ZeroTrust，Not Yet Valid返回Security_Encryption，Issuer Mismatch返回Security_ZeroTrust，Audience Mismatch返回Security_OAuth2。
已添加。All Claims Valid时，record_success（Security_IntrusionDetection），create_session（Security_Firewall），Session返回Security_IntrusionDetection，最后Client收到Security_ZeroTrust。
现在进入OAuth2认证流程，标注为Security_OAuth2。Client向Transport发起authenticate，携带Security_ZeroTrust标签。
已启动OAuth2流程。Transport转发给Auth，携带Security_Encryption，然后检查rate limit，携带Security_Firewall。通过后调用do_validate_oauth2_token，携带Security_OAuth2。
这里要先检查Cache Hit，从auth_oauth2_cache ETS查询，Token映射到Security_ZeroTrust。Hit时直接返回Security_IntrusionDetection给Client。
已添加Cache Hit分支。Cache Miss时，Auth向OAuth2 Provider发起HTTP POST /introspect，需要标注RFC 7662细节吗？
需要，标注RFC 7662 Introspection，Basic Auth用client_id:secret，Body包含token和token_type_hint。Provider返回200 OK + TokenInfo。
已添加。然后Auth内部validate_introspection_response，携带Security_Firewall，需要列出RFC 7662 REQUIRED fields？
需要，标注active=true、exp（Security_Encryption）、nbf（Security_ZeroTrust）、iss（Security_Firewall）。然后alt分支处理Token Inactive、Expired、Valid。
已添加。Inactive返回Security_OAuth2，Expired返回Security_IntrusionDetection，Valid时cache_oauth2_token携带Security_Encryption，需要标注缓存5分钟或到exp？

对，标注'Cache for up to 5 minutes or until exp（Security_IntrusionDetection）'。然后record_success（Security_Encryption），create_session（Security_Encryption），Session返回Security_IntrusionDetection，Client收到Security_Firewall。
已完成OAuth2流程。现在进入mTLS认证，Client向Transport发起authenticate，携带Security_OAuth2标签？
不对，mTLS的第一次调用应该携带Security_OAuth2}，注意这个右花括号。Transport转发给Auth时携带Security_IntrusionDetection。
已修正。然后检查rate limit，携带Security_OAuth2，通过后Auth调用erlmcp_auth_mtls的validate，携带Security_Firewall。
需要在MTLS旁详细标注mTLS Validation Pipeline的6个步骤：提取证书、X.509链验证、过期检查、OCSP/CRL撤销检查、Subject DN和CN匹配、证书深度限制验证。
已添加详细验证步骤。MTLS返回Security_Encryption给Auth，然后alt分支处理Certificate Invalid和Valid。

Invalid时，record_failure（Security_ZeroTrust），返回Security_Firewall给Client；Valid时，record_success（Security_Firewall），create_session（Security_Firewall}），注意这个右花括号，Session返回Security_Firewall，Client收到Security_IntrusionDetection。
已完成mTLS流程。现在进入Authorization Flow，标注Security_ZeroTrust。Client向Transport发起check_permission，携带Security_ZeroTrust？
对，Transport转发给Auth，携带Security_Firewall。Auth向Session Manager lookup session，Session返回#session{Security_ZeroTrust}。
已添加。然后alt分支：Session Not Found时返回Security_Firewall；Found时进入权限检查。
Found时，Auth调用RBAC的check_user_permission，携带Security_Firewall。RBAC内部先从auth_user_roles ETS获取用户角色，格式是UserId - [Security_Encryption]。
已添加。然后获取资源的allowed roles，从auth_acls ETS查询，格式是{Security_Encryption} - [Security_ZeroTrust]？
对，然后Check intersection，用lists:any/2检查UserRole和AllowedRoles的交集是否非空。需要标注这个逻辑。
已标注交集检查。Permission Denied时，RBAC返回Security_Encryption给Auth，Auth返回Security_IntrusionDetection给Client；Granted时返回ok。
需要在RBAC旁标注Default Roles：admin有Security_ZeroTrust权限，user有Security_ZeroTrust，guest只有Security_IntrusionDetection。
已添加默认角色说明。现在绘制Token Rotation流程，标注Security_ZeroTrust。Client直接调用Auth的rotate_token，携带Security_Firewall。
对，Auth先lookup session，然后内部generate new SessionId，用crypto:strong_rand_bytes（Security_ZeroTrust）base64编码。
已添加。然后insert new session，delete old session，返回Security_OAuth2给Client。需要标注旧会话立即失效防止劫持吗？
需要，标注'Old session invalidated immediately, Prevents session hijacking'。现在进入Token Revocation流程，标注Security_OAuth2。
已启动Token Revocation。Client调用Auth的revoke_token，携带Security_IntrusionDetection。Auth插入到auth_revoked_tokens，需要标注存储格式吗？
需要，标注'Store: Token - RevokedAt, Auto-cleanup after 7 days'。然后返回ok给Client。需要在Auth和JWT之间标注撤销令牌的即时生效说明。
已添加：'Revoked tokens rejected immediately, Even if exp claim valid'。最后是Session Cleanup的Note，标注Auto-cleanup every 60 seconds？
对，列出三项：Expired sessions（Security_OAuth2）、Revoked tokens（Security_IntrusionDetection）、OAuth2 cache（Security_Encryption）。
已完成所有流程绘制。我检查一下：四种认证方式（API Key、JWT、OAuth2、mTLS）、RBAC授权、Token Rotation、Token Revocation、Session Cleanup都完整了。需要调整什么吗？
检查一下JWT流程中，Auth调用jose_jws:peek_protected返回的是#{Security_ZeroTrust}，这个map格式对吗？还有verify返回的是{Security_Encryption}，是tuple格式。
确认正确，peek_protected返回map格式#{Security_ZeroTrust}，verify返回tuple格式{Security_Encryption}。还有OAuth2的cache hit返回的是{Security_ZeroTrust}，也是tuple。
再确认一下mTLS的create_session标签是Security_Firewall}，带右花括号，和其他的Security_Firewall区分。还有Transport的两个调用，一个是Security_OAuth2}，一个是Security_Firewall}，都带右花括号。
已全部确认并修正。最终图表包含：8个参与者、4种认证流程、完整的RBAC授权、Token生命周期管理，所有安全层级标签正确标注。图表已完成。
